title: astragalus aiwadzhi
intro: Astragalus aiwadzhi, a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, is also known as the Mongolian milkvetch or Aiwadzhi. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in Mongolian and Chinese herbal medicine, valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The astragalus aiwadzhi is believed to have various health benefits, including immune system support, anti-aging effects, and cardiovascular protection. Astragalus aiwadzhi is typically prepared as a decoction, capsule, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
